query: Ugh the bathroom is so dry my skin feels tight and my throat is a little scratchy and the kitchen is way too hot just thinking about making dinner makes me break a sweat.

I need to check the devices available in the kitchen to address the heat (likely an air conditioner or fan). I will get the list of devices in the kitchen.
I need to know how to control the humidifier in the bathroom to increase humidity. I will get the environment control rules for humidity.

steps.thought: I will start by turning on the bathroom humidifier to address the dryness. I'll use the OnOff cluster and the On command.
I need to set the fan speed of the humidifier to a nonzero value to ensure it actively humidifies the air, as per the control rules.
I will turn on the kitchen air conditioner to start cooling the room.
I need to set the air conditioner to cooling mode (SystemMode 3) to lower the temperature.

I need to set the cooling setpoint to a value lower than the current temperature (24.94°C) to cool the kitchen. I will set it to 22.00°C (2200). I also need to ensure the fan is running, so I will set the fan speed.
